name: Kwango
notes: Became Kwango Province in the 2015 repartition. Territories: Feshi, Kahemba, Kasongo-Lunda, Kenge, Kisandji, Popokabaka.

name: Kwilu
notes: Became Kwilu Province in 2015. Territories: Bagata, Bulungu, Gungu, Idiofa, Kikwit, Masi-Manimba, and others.

name: Mai-Ndombe
notes: Named after Lake Mai-Ndombe (formerly Lake Léopold II). Became Mai-Ndombe Province in 2015. Territories: Bokoro, Inongo, Kiri, Kutu, Nioki, Oshwe.

name: Plateaux
notes: Became part of Mai-Ndombe Province in 2015. Territories: Bolobo, Kwamouth, Mushie, Yumbi.

name: Bas-Fleuve
notes: Lower river district in Bas-Congo. Became part of Kongo Central Province in 2015. Territories: Lukula, Seke-Banza, Tshela.

name: Cataractes
notes: Named for the rapids on the lower Congo. Became part of Kongo Central Province in 2015. Territories: Luozi, Mbanza-Ngungu, Songololo.

name: Lukaya
notes: Became part of Kongo Central Province in 2015. Territories: Kasangulu, Kimvula, Madimba.

name: Kasaï
notes: Became Kasaï Province in 2015. Territories: Dekese, Ilebo, Kamonia (Tshikapa), Luebo, Mweka.

name: Lulua
notes: Named after the Lulua River. Became Kasaï-Central Province in 2015. Territories: Demba, Dibaya, Dimbelenge, Kazumba, Luiza.

name: Kabinda
notes: Became Lomami Province in 2015. Territories: Gandajika, Kabinda, Kamiji, Lubao, Luilu.

name: Sankuru
notes: Became Sankuru Province in 2015. Territories: Katako-Kombe, Kole, Lodja, Lomela, Lubefu, Lusambo.

name: Tshilenge
notes: Became part of Kasaï-Oriental Province (reduced) in 2015. Territories: Kabeya-Kamwanga, Katanda, Lupatapata, Miabi, Tshilenge.

name: Équateur
notes: Became Équateur Province (reduced) in 2015. Territories: Basankusu, Bikoro, Bolomba, Bomongo, Ingende, Lukolela, Mankanza.

name: Mongala
notes: Became Mongala Province in 2015. Territories: Bumba, Bongandanga, Lisala.

name: Nord-Ubangi
notes: Became Nord-Ubangi Province in 2015. Territories: Businga, Bosobolo, Mobayi-Mbongo, Yakoma.

name: Sud-Ubangi
notes: Became Sud-Ubangi Province in 2015. Territories: Budjala, Gemena, Kungu, Libenge.

name: Tshuapa
notes: Became Tshuapa Province in 2015. Territories: Befale, Boende, Bokungu, Djolu, Ikela, Monkoto.

name: Bas-Uele
notes: Became Bas-Uélé Province in 2015. Territories: Aketi, Ango, Bambesa, Bondo, Buta, Gwane, Poko.

name: Haut-Uele
notes: Became Haut-Uélé Province in 2015. Territories: Dungu, Faradje, Niangara, Rungu, Wamba, Watsa.

name: Ituri
notes: Became Ituri Province in 2015. Scene of the Ituri conflict (1999–2003). Territories: Aru, Djugu, Irumu, Mahagi, Mambasa.

name: Tshopo
notes: Became Tshopo Province in 2015. Centered on Kisangani. Territories: Bafwasende, Banalia, Basoko, Isangi, Opala, Ubundu, Yahuma.

name: Haut-Katanga
notes: Became Haut-Katanga Province in 2015. Copper belt region. Territories: Kambove, Kasenga, Kipushi, Mitwaba, Pweto, Sakania.

name: Haut-Lomami
notes: Became Haut-Lomami Province in 2015. Territories: Bukama, Kabongo, Kamina, Kanyama, Malemba-Nkulu.

name: Kolwezi
notes: City-district hybrid: had both communes and territories, led by a mayor. Became Lualaba Province (with Lualaba district) in 2015. Territories: Lubudi, Mutshatsha; Communes: Dilala, Manika.

name: Lualaba
notes: Became part of Lualaba Province (with Kolwezi district) in 2015. Territories: Dilolo, Kapanga, Sandoa.

name: Tanganyika
notes: Became Tanganyika Province in 2015. Along Lake Tanganyika. Territories: Kabalo, Kalemie, Kongolo, Manono, Moba, Nyunzu.
